creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please ask general support questions on the questions mailinglist or the 
appropriate ones. Check 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions/ for more 
information, in your case please boot in single usermode, make sure you 
are root and do a mount -a after which you should be able to edit 
/etc/fstab and restore behaviour.
